login.title: Login
login.orContinueWith: Or continue with a social account
login.termsText: By signing up or logging in, you acknowledge and agree to ONYU's
login.loginFailed: The email address or password is incorrect. Please try again.
login.failedToGetToken: We couldn't complete the sign-in. Please try again.
login.prepareLoginFailed: Something went wrong while preparing the sign-in. Please try again.
login.socialLoginSuccess: You’re signed in with your social account.
login.socialLoginFailed: Something went wrong with your social sign-in. Please try again.
login.socialLoginCancelled: Social sign-in was cancelled. Please try again when you’re ready.
login.socialLoginExpired: Your sign-in session expired. Please try again.
login.socialLoginPrepareFailed: We couldn’t start the social sign-in. Please try again.

loginModal.title: Sign in to continue
loginModal.description: You’ll need an account to explore curated Korean wellness programs.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.accountCreated: Your account has been created successfully.

signup.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered.
signup.codeExpired: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
signup.noVerificationRequest: There is no active verification request for this email. Please try again.
signup.invalidCode: The verification code is not valid.
signup.failedToGetToken: We couldn’t get the verification token.
